Pete Buttigieg is quickly becoming a face of President Biden’s Administration.

His ambitious plans will create thousands of jobs, help tackle climate change, and make it easier for Americans to travel around the country.

And his shrewd communication skills will help rally support for President Biden’s most important policies!

His ambitious plans will create thousands of jobs, help tackle climate change, and make it easier for Americans to travel around the country. And his shrewd communication skills will help rally support for President Biden’s most important policies! But we saw right-wing extremists attack Secretary Buttigieg during the Presidential Primary, and we’re worried they’ll try and smear Buttigieg again given the important role he’s playing in the new administration. | | | Thank you for your prompt response, \-- Team Ruiz Opinion Research | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. name: Heidi St. John
subject: *Reminder* My Response to Recent Accusations
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Friends Of Heidi St
body:
Keeping you up to date
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
---
Hello Friends,
With 425 days until the 2022 Primary election, the battle for Washington's 3rd Congressional District intensifies. Sadly, in a smear piece taken straight from the Democrat's playbook, an online news magazine has entered the fight with a mud-slinging article.
In true Fake News form, no one attempted to contact the campaign to seek the truth.
We've all grown accustomed to seeing the far left make up ridiculous accusations against political opponents, but it's heartbreaking to see Conservatives resorting to the same disgusting tactics. Those of us who still care about this country have enough on our hands fighting for the freedoms we are losing and the America we love without resorting to cheap, leftist political dirty tricks and hatchet jobs. We must stand together if we're to stand at all.
It's disappointing to see people I respect be willing to so quickly believe such things about me. The hundreds of thousands of people who follow me know that I am an open book and care deeply about truth and integrity in every area of my life. These attempts to destroy my character and undermine my effort to unseat Jaime Herrera-Beutler do not deter me. I will address these baseless accusations on Monday. I am an advocate for truth. Always.
This is a new part of the battlefield!
---

name: Sen. Mark Warner
subject: The Senate must seek accountability for January 6th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Nothing less will suffice

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30406521/289413365/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmQ5NDVhNi05OGM3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAGCA884WVU7WutBKIEsXb-I3fYL0xSdEGVN-p-8ewE=&emci=ef4340db-71c5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=abd945a6-98c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)

| | | **Demand Senate Republicans end their filibuster
of the January 6th commission**
---
[SIGN MY PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30406523/289413366/-1870359236?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmQ5NDVhNi05OGM3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAGCA884WVU7WutBKIEsXb-I3fYL0xSdEGVN-p-8ewE=&emci=ef4340db-71c5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=abd945a6-98c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)
Derek,

The January 6th U.S. Capitol insurrection was horrific and avoidable, incited by a defeated president unable to come to terms with his electoral loss.

Congress has a duty to make sure history never repeats itself, and that starts with a full, bipartisan investigation to find out the truth about the events of that day. **Unfortunately, many of my Republican colleagues recently voted against establishing a bipartisan commission to fully investigate the security failures and actions that led to the January 6th insurrection.**

_This is completely unacceptable._ **[Will you sign my petition calling on Senate Republicans to stop filibustering the January 6th commission?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30406524/289413368/-1870359236?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmQ5NDVhNi05OGM3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAGCA884WVU7WutBKIEsXb-I3fYL0xSdEGVN-p-8ewE=&emci=ef4340db-71c5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=abd945a6-98c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)**

We must not shirk our responsibility to find answers for this tragedy. We owe accountability to the American people. Nothing less will suffice.

This commission is about more than answers and accountability. It’s also about demonstrating to the world that democracy is resilient and enduring.

**[Please join me in calling on Senate Republicans to put country over party and end their filibuster of the January 6th commission.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30406527/289413369/-1870359236?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmQ5NDVhNi05OGM3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAGCA884WVU7WutBKIEsXb-I3fYL0xSdEGVN-p-8ewE=&emci=ef4340db-71c5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=abd945a6-98c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)**

— Mark Warner

| Friend,
The recent cyber attack on the JBS meat processing plant makes it clear that we must protect our critical infrastructure. Kat recently joined Varney & Co to discuss getting serious about securing our critical private infrastructure that has become a target in recent months.

| The FBI confirmed the JBS cyber attack was done by Russian non-state actors linked to Putin. We must hold them accountable, but our primary focus must be on securing the homefront against further attacks.
We cannot allow our critical infrastructure to continue to be vulnerable to attack by actors that want to hurt America. Can I count on your support to help secure our nation and protect our critical infrastructure?

clean_body: The recent cyber attack on the JBS meat processing plant makes it clear that we must protect our critical infrastructure. | | | | | | | Friend, The recent cyber attack on the JBS meat processing plant makes it clear that we must protect our critical infrastructure. Kat recently joined Varney & Co to discuss getting serious about securing our critical private infrastructure that has become a target in recent months. | | | | | The FBI confirmed the JBS cyber attack was done by Russian non-state actors linked to Putin. We must hold them accountable, but our primary focus must be on securing the homefront against further attacks. We cannot allow our critical infrastructure to continue to be vulnerable to attack by actors that want to hurt America. Can I count on your support to help secure our nation and protect our critical infrastructure? | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | For Florida, Team Cammack | | | | | | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: Fighting for our Veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Youngkin for Governor, Inc
body:
Yesterday, we honored and remembered the brave warriors who stormed the beaches of Normandy in 1944 and gave their all
|
---
>
Dear Friends, Yesterday, we honored and remembered the brave warriors who stormed the beaches of Normandy in 1944 and gave their all to defeat fascism and liberate millions. Many of those heroes did not return home, including most of Virginia’s very own Bedford Boys. Those who did started small businesses, raised families, and built their communities. Like the Greatest Generation and those who followed, Virginia’s veterans continue to make valuable and lasting contributions to our Commonwealth today. They served us, and now, we must serve them. That is why as governor, I am going to make it easier for veterans to start a business by cutting bureaucratic red tape and removing roadblocks that stand in the way. We are going to expand the portability of professional business licenses to make it easier for active-duty spouses and veteran couples to relocate to Virginia. And we are going to eliminate the income tax on military retirement pay, because the contributions and achievements of these veterans are critical to building a rip-roaring economy. Our veterans have made immeasurable sacrifices to defend our fundamental freedoms; it’s time we have a governor who will stand up for them, uphold our shared values, and ensure they have every opportunity to thrive as they live, work, and raise a family here in our Commonwealth.
---
---
-Glenn Youngkin
---

clean_body: Yesterday, we honored and remembered the brave warriors who stormed the beaches of Normandy in 1944 and gave their all | Dear Friends, Yesterday, we honored and remembered the brave warriors who stormed the beaches of Normandy in 1944 and gave their all to defeat fascism and liberate millions. Many of those heroes did not return home, including most of Virginia’s very own Bedford Boys. Those who did started small businesses, raised families, and built their communities. Like the Greatest Generation and those who followed, Virginia’s veterans continue to make valuable and lasting contributions to our Commonwealth today. They served us, and now, we must serve them. That is why as governor, I am going to make it easier for veterans to start a business by cutting bureaucratic red tape and removing roadblocks that stand in the way. We are going to expand the portability of professional business licenses to make it easier for active-duty spouses and veteran couples to relocate to Virginia. And we are going to eliminate the income tax on military retirement pay, because the contributions and achievements of these veterans are critical to building a rip-roaring economy. Our veterans have made immeasurable sacrifices to defend our fundamental freedoms; it’s time we have a governor who will stand up for them, uphold our shared values, and ensure they have every opportunity to thrive as they live, work, and raise a family here in our Commonwealth. -Glenn Youngkin Paid for by Youngkin for Governor, Inc. Not authorized by any other candidate. Youngkin for Governor, PO Box 3950, Merrifield, VA 22116

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Manchin still refuses to end the filibuster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The filibuster is the only thing standing in the way of our Democratic majority and sweeping progressive legislation necessary to improve the quality of life for so many Americans. Joe Manchin promised Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell that he is opposed to ending the filibuster for one reason: Bipartisanship. Joe Manchin had total confidence in the Republican Party's moral compass. However, in a shocking turn of events, Republicans have now successfully filibustered the **BIPARTISAN** investigation into the January 6 **attack on our country's Capitol**. McConnell made his choice clear: When forced between bipartisanship or his party's racist base \-- he chose the latter. Manchin is the current lifeline for the filibuster, and he's close to killing it. If we don't act quickly, we could lose our only chance to rid the Senate of its biggest roadblock. **[Peter, we're stepping up the pressure in Manchin's home state of West Virginia. We still haven't hit our goal of $3,000 to help build the grassroots network to turn up the heat on Manchin's obstructionism. We're helping Lindsey Boylan win in Manhattan: Chip in by Monday midnight Hi Peter, Lindsey Boylan, one of our endorsed candidates, is an **urban planner, women's rights advocate and candidate for Manhattan Borough President.** She has the opportunity to help working families in New York City by standing up for clean, livable public spaces, women's rights in the workplace, true accessibility and support for residents in the biggest urban center in the United States. **[Will you stand with us in support and help us elect a](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30417020/289457771/-1644589594?refcode=0524&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyNmFmM2NkLWIzYzctZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Z7qL2LtxuWR2j-dB1PYpoq6z9GUWGhrBNfaVFq4QJnQ=)****[qualified, hard-working public servant who truly know first-hand what the majority of Americans endure from day to day--especially moms, raising the children of our future?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30417021/289457772/-1996155106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyNmFmM2NkLWIzYzctZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Z7qL2LtxuWR2j-dB1PYpoq6z9GUWGhrBNfaVFq4QJnQ=)** **A mom’s voice is an undeniable asset when creating policy that impacts our children, our families and our future. Yet, too many barriers keep women, especially moms, out of elected positions. ** Getting her elected is a rare opportunity to take the fight to New York's power structure--which is still overwhelmingly white and male. Lindsey is a mom, a planning expert, a true progressive who is ready to meet this moment and build a better future for the families of New York City. [**She's a threat to the status quo. And with your help today, she can be so much more--so I'm writing to ask you to contribute to her victory on June 22nd!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lindsey-for-ny-moms) If you live in NYC, every contribution gets matched 8 to 1 if you contribute by midnight tonight. This is a huge opportunity - let's seize it now! **Let's** **show Lindsey and everyone that we have her back and that we believe in all moms who put themselves out there and lead by example.** [**Peter, can you chip in today by midnight to help me and Moms in Office elect a passionate, progressive woman as our next Manhattan Borough President?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lindsey-for-ny-moms) As always, thank you for all that you do. I am truly grateful. Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office [**CHIP IN**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lindsey-for-ny-moms) | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30417022/289457773/-2114815409?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyNmFmM2NkLWIzYzctZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Z7qL2LtxuWR2j-dB1PYpoq6z9GUWGhrBNfaVFq4QJnQ=&emci=0e680914-a8c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=226af3cd-b3c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30417023/289457776/-1042187117?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyNmFmM2NkLWIzYzctZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Z7qL2LtxuWR2j-dB1PYpoq6z9GUWGhrBNfaVFq4QJnQ=&emci=0e680914-a8c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=226af3cd-b3c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30417024/289457777/-977212835?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyNmFmM2NkLWIzYzctZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Z7qL2LtxuWR2j-dB1PYpoq6z9GUWGhrBNfaVFq4QJnQ=&emci=0e680914-a8c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=226af3cd-b3c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131)

This report will show whether we have the resources to fight back against Republican attacks. We want our report to make it clear that there’s a lot of grassroots support behind our campaign. This is how Republicans will judge our campaign. They will be looking at our report closely to see if we really have the resources to win in 2022. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you in advance for your support. Team O'Halleran **Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today. = | ****=****** | To learn more, please visit and follow Tom on , , and . | Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082

body:
Please support Susan Wright for Congress in the 6th District of Texas. | | | | |
---
Can't read this? [Click here.](https://mailchi.mp/housefreedomfund/endorsement-susan-wright-tx-06?e=b2c16e6198)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
| _Susan Wright, Candidate for Congress (TX-06)_
---
|
---
| Peter,

House Freedom Fund has one mission: to help elect strong, tough, principled conservatives to the U.S. House of Representatives. In Texas’s 6th congressional district, we’ve found one.

**Susan Wright** (R-TX) is exactly the kind of leader we need in the House to fight liberals in both parties. Susan has HFF’s full endorsement and support, and I hope she can count on yours too.

[**Join House Freedom Fund in supporting Susan today!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=43c49efc23&e=b2c16e6198)

Susan is the widow of former House Freedom Caucus member Ron Wright, a great friend and a tireless champion for traditional American values. His death in February was a shock. But his legacy of service and commitment to making America great again is at the heart of Susan’s campaign to replace him.

▶︎ Susan is a pro-life, pro-gun, pro-wall conservative ready to take on The Swamp.

▶︎ She has served Texas for three decades – working in the state legislature, advising local communities on transportation and economic issues, and fighting the Left at her husband’s side.

▶︎ She has publicly pledged to join the House Freedom Caucus.

▶︎ She has been endorsed by President Donald Trump.

[**Susan is ready to fight for us. Please help us fight for her!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=7f2b962a0f&e=b2c16e6198)

Susan finished first in the primary election last month, ahead of 22 other candidates. Now she is in the runoff up against a classic RINO who favors amnesty and opposes school choice.

Never-Trump Republicans are funding Susan’s opponent, who is trying to win the July 27th runoff election with Democrat crossover votes.

**Conservatives must answer this challenge.**

President Trump supports Susan. So do grassroots conservatives in Texas and around the country. This election is HFF’s top election priority for this summer. We have to send a message to the Never-Trump RINOs that they’re not in charge anymore.

[**Please give Susan your support today!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=20223338ac&e=b2c16e6198)

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to support conservative leadership in Washington.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
House Freedom Fund

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Why Joe Manchin is WRONG on the filibuster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
He’s dooming our democracy in the name of bipartisanship.
#

Yesterday, Senator Joe Manchin wrote an op-ed explaining why he will vote against the For The People Act and will not do anything to end the filibuster. It might as well have been titled "Why I’ll vote to preserve Jim Crow."
From voting rights to LGBTQ+ equality, so many critical pieces of legislation are stalled in the Senate because Republicans are using the filibuster to hold Congress hostage.
**I’ve long advocated for abolishing the filibuster, a relic of Jim Crow and a consistent impediment to progress. Today, I’m renewing that call — and I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll join me. So please:**
[**Add your name if you agree: we must repeal the filibuster.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30418275/289461830/-2115814458?refcode2=9243da94-b9c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210607-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjQzZGE5NC1iOWM3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3bCIvHEuveNNAw1r1rL9luoSRuNnheIHITrh9J70N0M=&emci=29546f7b-b9c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9243da94-b9c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)
Joe Manchin parroted right-wing talking points and claimed that the filibuster was part of our Founders’ plan for checks and balances – but the filibuster has nothing to do with the Founders. In fact, the Founders specifically rejected the idea of requiring supermajority support for passing laws.
The truth is that Republicans will continue to block popular legislation over and over again until we abolish the filibuster. The For The People Act, among many other bills recently passed in the House, has bipartisan support among the American people — just not with GOP politicians and the billionaires who bankroll them.
Manchin didn’t even take issue with any of the provisions in the legislation. By dooming our democracy in the name of bipartisanship, Senator Manchin is betraying both.
[**So please, if you reject Joe Manchin’s nonsense, add your name to support a repeal of the filibuster so we can pass important bills, save our democracy, and get things done for the American people.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30418276/289461831/-2115814458?refcode2=9243da94-b9c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210607-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjQzZGE5NC1iOWM3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3bCIvHEuveNNAw1r1rL9luoSRuNnheIHITrh9J70N0M=&emci=29546f7b-b9c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9243da94-b9c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)
Thank you, as always, for your support. Together we will defeat Jim Crow and save American democracy.
Onward,
Mondaire
* * *

| Former Missouri Governor & U.S. Navy SEAL Eric Greitens slammed Missouri RINOs for caving to liberals after they objected to a bill that would have honored Rush Limbaugh with a "Rush Limbaugh Day" on his birthday, January 12th.

"Over and over, all across the country, we see this kind of caving and capitulation from Republicans. In Congress RINOs like Liz Cheney voted to impeach President Donald Trump, while other "Republicans" backed a commission to ostensibly investigate the events of January 6."

name: John Castorani
subject: I hunted down terrorists who will be set free . . .
body:
My name is John Castorani and I don't think we've met, but if we do, please lean in a little and speak up so I can hear you.
| | | [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/YchSeSmY763l80H1NpC2w0Ig/ZxWmbaq1VERkk4776mShNg) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, John Castorani.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/YchSeSmY763l80H1NpC2w0Ig/ZxWmbaq1VERkk4776mShNg)**.
---

---
| [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/YchSeSmY763l80H1NpC2w0Ig/ZxWmbaq1VERkk4776mShNg)
Patriot,

[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/YchSeSmY763l80H1NpC2w0Ig/ZxWmbaq1VERkk4776mShNg) My name is John Castorani and I don't think we've met, but if we do, please lean in a little and speak up so I can hear you.

I've been blown up a few times and my body has been banged up quite a bit from my **seven tours with the Army 's Special Operations Command**.

But I'm still going and back to my family business as a cattle rancher in Virginia.

I'm writing you because [**I want your help as I run for Congress**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/YchSeSmY763l80H1NpC2w0Ig/ZxWmbaq1VERkk4776mShNg).

I fought on the fields of Africa and the Middle East and I'm running for Congress so that my son DOESN'T have to follow in my footsteps.

Let me explain.

**In North Africa, me and my team hunted down the terrorists that killed Ambassador Christopher Stevens, Sean Smith, Glen Doherty and Tyrone Woods in the attack on our embassy in Benghazi on September 11, 2012.**

Their deaths were unnecessary and Barack Obama, Hillary Clinton and Susan Rice were NEVER held accountable.

One of my jobs in the military was to hunt down and capture or kill those responsible for planning the Benghazi attack - while bureaucrats in Washington made that job near impossible, **we got it done**.

You probably recognize the name **Jen Psaki, Biden 's press secretary**.

At the time she was spokeswoman for the State Department and would tell the world, "no official affiliates of core al Qaeda . . . directed or planned the [Benghazi] attack."

And Congress would only approve action against al Qaeda stemming back to 2001.

Ridiculous bureaucracy, right?

While hunting down these men in Africa, we had them in the sights of our rifles -- terrorists who were responsible for killing our brothers -- but we couldn't squeeze the trigger unless we could PROVE they were al Qaeda.

So with a lot of risk and even more gunfire, we had to capture some of the planners like Ahmed Abu Khattala who is serving 22 years in prison.

Twenty-two years for attacking an American embassy and murdering four of our own? The man could be free before turning age 66!

**Washington MUST change and it will never happen unless Americans who have risked their lives in warfare have a chance to tell the soft politicians Congress how to get the job done.**

Again, my name is John Castorani, and [**I 'm respectfully requesting you help get me to Congress**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/YchSeSmY763l80H1NpC2w0Ig/ZxWmbaq1VERkk4776mShNg).

To support my campaign, [**just go here and donate as much as you can**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/YchSeSmY763l80H1NpC2w0Ig/ZxWmbaq1VERkk4776mShNg) as every dollar will help get me one step close to victory.

I really appreciate you taking the time to read this message and offer your hard-earned support.

With Respect,

John Castorani
Candidate for Congress
Virginia's 7th Congressional District

Paid for by John Castorani for Congress Contributions to John Castorani for Congress are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Countering a false and destructive narrative
body:
There is a growing movement to teach young Americans that our nation's history is oppressive and shameful--that the essential fact of American history
"Sponsored Message"

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=277a19c1b4fb436ea8fcefab649a33dc&_e=gEst1I2DbbiDqbA09_H-WzBsue6x5lkbTgWPhyWfy9-DmlSpsm2cnECDia0rFWQFQkDYXEIiBSegobtetoaLr9W-d5iaq9prMt34_0OrzIZJsJho8pCKGXt_z2-g6M-8IMnIDha8-i9JnySZgpsYKO400Ob_I8R3hOMvSNIHJkFjFs-9Xj4pEC8k94RDhHyMP9fX0rk3ZX1PU43dNqnT0otwO8Sky5FRsk2DcyyzOyBxltOR5eHC2ghuiaG4gXA9_7RqCoc6o-uqGEA-JpKJCPgT662NbgjHkl7-R7fD9NCMVaVhLKkpS6lXgoOxfI41Sg8At1x3Soa0rKRrz-azawxMoga1Cc4qXxXfLCuTDmQ72HyHU-mir0t6vTYGK8xDT75Vpw6FWIpaHJwr3mCPYqMBRujuuBxd2ILFml4EVmmKe5rpJVTpHLvAYTx8VEMnHY-L4RfmtbrVt26puJRLvM1hYv8V64f0A07pz3SqKuE%3D) Fellow American,
There is a growing movement to teach young Americans that our nation’s history is **oppressive** and **shameful** —that the essential fact of American history is not freedom but slavery.
**To counter this false and destructive narrative, Hillsdale College has produced a new free online course, “Civil Rights in American History,” which is now available in a special DVD box set.**
This course covers the Founders’ understanding of equality, natural rights, and civil rights; the quest for justice in America through the Civil War, during Reconstruction, and in the 20th century; and the danger posed to freedom and civil rights today by identity politics. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=277a19c1b4fb436ea8fcefab649a33dc&_e=gEst1I2DbbiDqbA09_H-WzBsue6x5lkbTgWPhyWfy9-DmlSpsm2cnECDia0rFWQFQkDYXEIiBSegobtetoaLr9W-d5iaq9prMt34_0OrzIZJsJho8pCKGXt_z2-g6M-8IMnIDha8-i9JnySZgpsYKO400Ob_I8R3hOMvSNIHJkFjFs-9Xj4pEC8k94RDhHyMP9fX0rk3ZX1PU43dNqnT0otwO8Sky5FRsk2DcyyzOyBxltOR5eHC2ghuiaG4gXA9o7qLKUIiPF1aYK6_-5zCqs-dR2LFUAbhfhhEE0Pv9cK0wflYEoIHPFgVM5Pk4l6RTI66GWozCf5ZsMn13F89GujFlNDfTMSk2xctCNKdgANhZl8cobGxJNXIpW0-_RT0IHdDD2E6H-FSFyMxJKXZTheEyqDGOSIh3LBmGn0Qrnng7PcPQD7NMcuSdLkaufoGFUIo1-BydZ9QLOwP-brBXNNZ68LOKAzmjMzYPim56dY%3D) **You can help promote “Civil Rights in American History” and receive a DVD box set of this timely and important new course by giving a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more today.**
We produce free online courses, as we do all of our work, while refusing to accept government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. We rely entirely on the support of private citizens who agree with our mission on behalf of liberty.
Please help promote Hillsdale’s free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for America by giving your best gift today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible donation below:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-civil-rights-in-american-history-dvd](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=277a19c1b4fb436ea8fcefab649a33dc&_e=gEst1I2DbbiDqbA09_H-WzBsue6x5lkbTgWPhyWfy9-DmlSpsm2cnECDia0rFWQFQkDYXEIiBSegobtetoaLr9W-d5iaq9prMt34_0OrzIZJsJho8pCKGXt_z2-g6M-8IMnIDha8-i9JnySZgpsYKO400Ob_I8R3hOMvSNIHJkFjFs-9Xj4pEC8k94RDhHyMP9fX0rk3ZX1PU43dNqnT0otwO8Sky5FRsk2DcyyzOyBxltOR5eHC2ghuiaG4gXA9SQQesNAui5BjXMNpr1vZv-KMrZXPLlNSLMRISItRXyfqeTLjcV8W34WJltj_33oxEhA5RunToY21a_4xpca0Dv7OjAqXILctZ9REeCnX8baFLtyvVYcDCL055vgVBcx8beQRa1P0KAvqPoRqR3r33sgf5u4VPfTFBMS3sW5GNidZgAwYFyA6IiVBR3o9_lsitah-lVimD94Pu8xLtbuvuR0_pd_03nkeDAekcR9C95c%3D)**
There are only a limited number of “**Civil Rights in American History** ” DVD box sets available, so reserve your copy before they are gone.
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its educational mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Bob Carlstrom, AMAC Action
subject: A tale of two administrations
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c109%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=yMRbA%2be1KR%2bZQmm8wpHTgw&sysid=1)
Dear Fellow American, Remember just a few months ago when gas prices were under $1.50 per gallon? Remember when there was peace in the Middle East and our allies and adversaries alike respected the United States? Remember when our southern border was secure and law and order prevailed in our communities? _Now gas prices are at a 40-year high, terrorist bombs fly into Israel on a daily basis, and the crisis at our southern border is the worst it’s been since the Obama era. _ But don’t be fooled... these things did not happen by accident. They’re a direct result of the far-Left Democrat’s intentional plot to destroy the Constitutional underpinnings of our country, to squash the States, and take over every aspect of our lives. And I’m afraid that if folks like you and me do not immediately challenge them and sustain that challenge, America is going to be weakened. **[That’s why I’m urgently asking you to join me and our army of 2.4 million conservative patriots to save our country from being destroyed by today’s far-left Democrats.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3842%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=axPownsOKiseEJUISfoQ2w&sysid=1)** Allow me to introduce myself. My name is Bob Carlstrom - President of AMAC Action. Unlike the left-leaning AARP, AMAC Action is the largest and most impactful conservative senior advocacy group in the country. _In fact, you may have heard of us before ..._ _We stood up to President Obama when he tried to socialize our healthcare system with “Obamacare” and “Medicare for All” ..._ _ _ _We stood up to the Congressional Democrat’s repeated attempts to destroy Social Security and make it insolvent for our generation ..._ _ _ _And now - with the slew of socialist policies flooding out of Washington D.C. - we’re standing up to the Biden-Harris-Pelosi led Democrat Party for trying to shred our Constitution._ Right now, our 59 AMAC Action chapters and 328 delegates are working hard to influence key members of Congress to vote on the issues that will make life easier for our 2.4 million senior members and to protect our American values. And more than that, we’re in the trenches of state and local legislatures throughout the country to impact legislation that will prevent the radically liberal policies coming out of Washington D.C. from devastating our middle class. But that work is easier said than done. Because as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our traditional, conservative values is with the help of generous Americans like yourself. **[Will you help us fight for our America-first values in Congress with a one-time gift of $25, $50, $75, $100 or more to AMAC Action today?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3843%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AdEkz8f00bx4hNOEyrF8rA&sysid=1)** Surely, America has seen her fair share of ups and downs, ebbs and flows. _I saw it 40 years ago when I helped President Ronald Reagan __bring our country back from Carter’s failed leadership - and __I saw it a few years ago when I stood next to President Trump __as he brought our country back from Obama’s failed leadership._ [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3844%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YRUYCiyZmfusUisQ1pcB1w&sysid=1) In just over a few short months of Joe Biden’s presidency, his disastrous policies and actions are causing:
* Record-high unemployment
* Increased violent crime
* Accelerating inflation
* Runaway government spending to be supported by a monstrous and debilitating tax proposal
* Fostering illegal immigration; drug smuggling; and human trafficking...

But that's not all. Behind the scenes, the Democrats are trying to fundamentally transform our Constitutional Republic into a socialist utopia by giving the federal government complete control over our state and local elections, expanding the Supreme Court with a handful of activist liberal judges, and helping Big Tech corporations censor anyone who does not share their far-Left world view. And if God-fearing, freedom-loving patriots like you and me do not take immediate action to fight for our beliefs, the country our grandchildren inherit will be radically different from that which we were so blessed to grow up in. **[So, can I count on you to help AMAC Action influence legislators to stop the leftist Democrats unconstitutional power-grab with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100 or more today?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3955%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HO%2fXHjo3qXxI1jE2dJmEhw&sysid=1)** Thank you in advance for your generous support. Sincerely, Bob Carlstrom, President, AMAC Action [**SUPPPORT AMAC ACTION**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3956%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NPzV%2bgSizn%2boJHdx8lOLAQ&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3844%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YRUYCiyZmfusUisQ1pcB1w&sysid=1) AMAC stands here to fight for our God-given rights and to protect our American values! We stand guard for our Constitution and the freedom it guarantees. | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3957%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rIuBbzHI7iNZ1hLACrmFZA&sysid=1)
---

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

body:
Voting update!

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30423126/289479582/-492404344?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjU1MjdjMS1jNmM3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ff9ixTEroPqsJUg-EK8ZLInvpRoOYvKPZbB5ycp3id0=&emci=4666d158-4ac5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=325527c1-c6c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957) Friends, this is a _**HUGE**_ win for democracy! In 2020, we saw record numbers of mail-in voting as Americans stayed home to protect themselves and their loved ones from COVID-19. But, the thing is ... _mail-in voting doesn’t just help us fight a pandemic!_ **Mail-in voting makes democracy more accessible for working parents, voters with disabilities, elderly voters, and anyone else who lacks the resources to easily get to a polling place.** It’s simple:** Mail-in voting is good for democracy.**
### [_**Will you sign on to our petition to show your support for accessibility in our electoral democracy?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30423128/289479583/-492404344?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjU1MjdjMS1jNmM3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ff9ixTEroPqsJUg-EK8ZLInvpRoOYvKPZbB5ycp3id0=&emci=4666d158-4ac5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=325527c1-c6c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957)

---
Democrats are leading the fight for voting rights here in Nevada, and _Susie Lee is no exception._
That’s because the more people who participate in democracy, the better off we all are. **Democracy works best when everyone’s voices are heard.**
Republicans in Congress and state legislatures across the country are fighting against this kind of pro-democracy voting because **they know when we all vote,_they lose._**
But that’s not how a democracy works, folks —**voters get to choose their elected officials, NOT the other way around.**

name: Team Navarre
subject: 2 months in
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,
Stewart kicked his campaign off just over two months ago, and things are off to a great start.
Since kick-off, Stewart has been meeting with voters in the District and one thing is absolutely clear: people are ready to flip VA-01. It might seem like a far way off, but our democracy is on the line in 2022.
As a Marine who deployed to Iraq and supported the first elections there in 2005, Stewart understands how difficult it is to maintain a democracy. We’re a house divided right now, and we all know a house divided cannot stand. Stewart wants to go to Congress to heal the wounds afflicting our country and work to mend the partisan divides that are threatening to tear our great democracy apart.
If you believe in the power of American democracy and want to see Congress work to heal our divides rather than inflaming them, chip in to send Stewart to Washington. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn?refcode=210607-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn?refcode=210607-email&express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn?refcode=210607-email&express_lane=true&amount=25]

We don’t elect representatives to stall legislation that will help the citizens of this great country or tell their constituents that red or blue states and districts are their enemies, we elect them to get the job done. Stewart will get the job done.
Give any amount to Stewart’s campaign by clicking this link: http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn?refcode=210607-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn?refcode=210607-email]
Believe in America!
Very best,
Team Navarre

name: Adam Spanberger
subject: Abigail’s message (ICYMI!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| Peter,

I wanted to make sure you didn't miss this email from Abigail. Special interest groups continue to attack her work to lower prescription drug prices.

[_**Will you help her campaign weather these vicious attacks and contribute?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8S5KBpw0f2gRSWVkx3aLWF7mHZbEBg8HG3DomnpBwP0=/WZeS2iJVAmhjz3gSc8l0FGbRbIzbhOg0NHIesusL76g=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210607-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| [SUPPORT ABIGAIL ](https://act.myngp.com/el/8S5KBpw0f2gRSWVkx3aLWF7mHZbEBg8HG3DomnpBwP0=/WZeS2iJVAmhjz3gSc8l0FGbRbIzbhOg0NHIesusL76g=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210607-1-EM&amount=25)
---
I am so proud of the work she's done to pass a bipartisan bill that delivers common-sense results and cost savings to taxpayers. Prescription drug pricing is one of the most important issues to people in Central Virginia and it impacts families across the nation. Abigail is committed to fighting for affordable prescription drugs.

[_**If you haven 't already, please take the time to read Abigail's message. And if you can, send a contribution to help her campaign respond to these false attack ads.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8S5KBpw0f2gRSWVkx3aLWF7mHZbEBg8HG3DomnpBwP0=/WZeS2iJVAmhjz3gSc8l0FGbRbIzbhOg0NHIesusL76g=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210607-1-EM&amount=25)
| [SUPPORT ABIGAIL ](https://act.myngp.com/el/8S5KBpw0f2gRSWVkx3aLWF7mHZbEBg8HG3DomnpBwP0=/WZeS2iJVAmhjz3gSc8l0FGbRbIzbhOg0NHIesusL76g=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210607-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Thank you,

Adam Spanberger

\----------Forwarded Message--------
From: Abigail Spanberger
Subject: Somebody is spending a lot of money in our district to keep prescription drug prices high

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/8S5KBpw0f2gRSWVkx3aLWF7mHZbEBg8HG3DomnpBwP0=/WZeS2iJVAmhjz3gSc8l0FGbRbIzbhOg0NHIesusL76g=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210607-1-EM&amount=25)
Peter

For the second time this month, national special interest groups have launched TV ads in our congressional district. The target of their ominous ads and anger --besides me -- is H.R. 3, the "Lower Drug Costs Now Act."

H.R. 3 is the bill that would give Medicare the power to negotiate its prescription drug prices, which it is currently prohibited from doing, unlike the Veterans Administration which can negotiate prices.

H.R. 3 would make the negotiated rates available to all Americans with private insurance, saving the hard-earned money of the people I represent -- who at times are choosing between filling their prescriptions and buying groceries.

The nonpartisan CBO estimates the bill would save taxpayers $500 billion over the next ten years, which the bill proposes reinvesting in Medicare benefits, combating the opioid crisis, and supporting community health centers in rural communities like the one I serve.

I believe competition in the marketplace is a good thing, and clearly many of my colleagues agree because H.R. 3 passed last Congress with bipartisan support.

So who would hate a bill that delivers such common-sense results and cost savings to taxpayers enough to run more than a hundred thousand dollars worth of attack ads in my district?

The same special interests that will continue spending dollar after dollar attacking me and my work to lower prescription drug prices from now until election day 2022.

We have a long road to go and many attacks yet to weather. [_**Will you support me today with a contribution to our campaign?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8S5KBpw0f2gRSWVkx3aLWF7mHZbEBg8HG3DomnpBwP0=/WZeS2iJVAmhjz3gSc8l0FGbRbIzbhOg0NHIesusL76g=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210607-1-EM&amount=25)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/8S5KBpw0f2gRSWVkx3aLWF7mHZbEBg8HG3DomnpBwP0=/WZeS2iJVAmhjz3gSc8l0FGbRbIzbhOg0NHIesusL76g=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210607-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Thank you,

Abigail Spanberger

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/8S5KBpw0f2gRSWVkx3aLWF7mHZbEBg8HG3DomnpBwP0=/WZeS2iJVAmhjz3gSc8l0FGbRbIzbhOg0NHIesusL76g=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210607-1-EM&amount=25)

---
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---

PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for week of June 7th: Melt Joe Manchin’s phones & more!
body:
| |
---
Democrats are trying, and will continue to try until we take the majority back from them, to end the filibuster and pass bills that will allow them to take over state elections. They know they may very well lose their majorities in 2022 and want to do as much damage as they can before that happens.

**Action items for this week include:**
* Call Sen. Manchin’s offices to say thank you and urge him to oppose the ‘Pelosi Power Grab’ bill
* Commit to sign waving on June 29th and attending your local school board meeting in July
* Research your local government entities so you are ready to act
* Sign-up if you haven’t signed up yet for various activities

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**Call Sen. Manchin About Election Integrity!**
Sen. Joe Manchin just published on op-ed stating that he will not vote for S.1, ‘The Corrupt Politicians Act,” and he won’t weaken the filibuster. This is great news and **we need to thank him.** However, he has already indicated that he supports the **‘Pelosi Power Grab’** bill, which the Democrats are calling H.R. 4, a.k.a. the John Lewis Act.

**Even if you don’t live in WV,** **it is absolutely critical that you call his offices.** As these bills would allow the federal government to take over **_your_** state’s elections, you have a right to call him and tell him what you think. And if you **_do_** live in WV, it is _especially_ important for you to keep calling Sen. Manchin!

**If you are able, please call _all_ of his office locations! **We have heard that it can make a difference to call the local offices and not just the D.C. office. If the Democrats pass one or both of these bills, they will control elections and it will be terribly difficult for non-Democrats to ever win anything again. So, if you have even just a few minutes, call all of his offices! And as always, be firm but polite when you call.

D.C.: 202 224-3954
Charleston: 304-342-5855
Martinsburg: 304-264-4626
Fairmont: 304-368-0567

**When you call, tell his office:**
* **Thank you for Sen. Manchin’s courageous stance** against S.1, ‘The Corrupt Politicians Act,’ (the Democrats call it the ‘For the People Act’), and his courage to stand against Democrat efforts to weaken or get rid of the filibuster. We want to thank him for both of these!

* **Next, please oppose the ‘Pelosi Power Grab’ bill, known as the John Lewis Act.** In fact, Sen. Manchin has promised to not give control of WV elections to federal bureaucrats, and he must keep this promise!**** The ‘Pelosi Power Grab’ bill, which right now Sen. Manchin wants to expand to apply all 50 states, would require every state and city to get permission from the radically left-wing Department of Justice Civil Rights Division before changing ANY voting/election laws. This undoubtedly gives control of ALL election laws to the unaccountable, unelected bureaucracy!

**Resources to read before you call Sen. Manchin:**
[Returning the ghost of Eric Holder to the Justice Department](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTU4LWUxMDBkMTcxNGRkMjQ3YmVhNWU1ZDNiM2NiMmY1YzEy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVoaWxsLmNvbS9vcGluaW9uL2NhbXBhaWduLzU1NDc5OS1yZXR1cm5pbmctdGhlLWdob3N0LW9mLWVyaWMtaG9sZGVyLXRvLXRoZS1qdXN0aWNlLWRlcGFydG1lbnQ_bWlkPTQzODg1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=ERIGv8n49H4KRlKhgwYvNg)

**Commit to Sign Waving on June 29th & Attending Your Local School Board Meeting in July**
We are all much more likely to do something if we make an official commitment to do it – that’s why during election time, campaigns get people to sign up and commit to actually go vote.

**Therefore, we are asking you to sign up and commit to sign wave on June 29th and attend your local school board meeting in July. Click through the links below to make your commitments.**

**Sign Waving on June 29th**
In honor of Independence Day, and in order to stand against the divisiveness of the left and ideologies like Critical Race Theory, the sign waving theme is **‘United We Stand.’** The grassroots approved holding the sign waving event before July 4th, so that more people would be able to participate.

**[I will organize or attend a ‘United We Stand’ sign waving on June 29th](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTU4LWUxMDBkMTcxNGRkMjQ3YmVhNWU1ZDNiM2NiMmY1YzEy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZUozRktqaWdYVHAtMmU5bHJ5cnc3YUF3Z3NJRnB4OVkzX2pqeVdiVlkyWUdFS0VRL3ZpZXdmb3JtP3VzcD1zZl9saW5rJm1pZD00Mzg4NSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=I9dpKGWL0iM1XZFHQG-kwQ)**

We will have a toolkit ready for you before July, so that you have plenty of time to prepare for the meeting. Part of your preparation is doing the research listed in the next action item.

[Vanity Fair breaks down what they found.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTU4LWUxMDBkMTcxNGRkMjQ3YmVhNWU1ZDNiM2NiMmY1YzEy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudmFuaXR5ZmFpci5jb20vbmV3cy8yMDIxLzA2L3RoZS1sYWItbGVhay10aGVvcnktaW5zaWRlLXRoZS1maWdodC10by11bmNvdmVyLWNvdmlkLTE5cy1vcmlnaW5zP21pZD00Mzg4NSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=wqXNVTOFeYZLTnUt-c8n8w)

**Get Your Research on Local Government Done This Week**
July is National Attend a School Board Meeting Month. August is National Attend a City Government Meeting Month. This week is the time to get all your research done about your local government, so that in July and August (and any other time that arises), you are ready to act.

Please note that the exact names of the government entities will vary from place to place, i.e. it might be called “county council,” or “county commission,” etc. That’s part of your research – what are your local government entities even called? Compile your research in a spreadsheet or document on your computer, or on paper, whichever you prefer. Just make sure it’s easy to access when you need it.

**Basic List of Local Government Entities to Research**
* School Board (even if you don’t have kids in the local school district, you pay taxes to support it and have a say)
* City Council
* County Council
* Library Board
* Board of Elections

**Basic Questions to Research**
* How many members are there?
* Who are the members?
* What is their contact information?
* Are they appointed or elected? If appointed, who appoints them and when? If elected, when is their next election?
* Do they represent districts? If so, what are the districts and is there a map you can access?
* When do they meet?
* Can you attend a meeting in person or is it online?
* Where do they meet if it’s in person? If it’s online, how can you register for the online meeting? Do you need to RSVP ahead of time?
* Can you comment during a meeting? If so, what are the rules about commenting? How much time will you have? Do you have to sign up ahead of time?
* Right now, do they require masks to attend the meetings?
* What’s the process for submitting legislation/ordinances/rules to them?

_Anything else you find that you think would be important to know ahead of time!_

Finally, begin thinking about what the most concerning, pressing issue is in your local schools. Is it Critical Race Theory/Diversity, Equity, Inclusion programs? Is it mandatory masks? Is it getting kids back into the classroom in person? Is it crazy sex-ed curriculum? If you aren’t sure, ask other parents, or people who have kids in the school system, or look for news stories, or look on social media. If you don’t know, use this time to try and find out. If there isn’t a pressing issue, then you may want to work on getting them to proactively reject Critical Race Theory, etc. Look for more information in the toolkit once it is released.
|

If you’re interested in running for local office, especially if you’d like to run in the 2022 election, now is the time to let us know because you must get trained in 2021! | "Move over, Woodrow Wilson. Take a seat, Barack Obama. Let him through, Franklin Roosevelt and Lyndon Johnson. Based on last week’s $6 trillion budget proposal, Joe Biden has surpassed all of those liberal icons to take a position at the head of the pack as the most extreme radical ever to inhabit the White House. Were Biden to succeed in turning his budget proposal into reality, he would more radically transform the nation than those previous presidents combined." Even though the vaccines have been rolled out, COVID cases are steadily declining, and the pandemic is drawing to a close, you wouldn’t guess it from hearing the policy ideas that liberals are espousing.

They want to:

- Keep people unemployed, and on government benefits FOREVER
- Make it hard for small businesses to compete with all these government benefits
- Use this as an opportunity to transform our nation into a Socialist one

name: Collier HQ
subject: dignity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Hi folks, Every Texan is entitled to dignity. The dignity to be able to marry who they love.
The dignity to not face discrimination for living their lives as their maker created them.
The dignity to live openly and proudly without fear of discrimination. June is Pride Month — a time of celebration and recognition for all the contributions and achievements made by the LGBTQ+ community throughout our country’s and our state’s history. It is a celebration of love and dignity. Folks, in Texas, it is still legal to deny employment, housing, and public accommodations to someone because of who they love. The bathroom bills, the hate, and the bigotry must come to an end. **It is simply unacceptable.** We have a lot of work to do in order to ensure that all Texans live free of fear of discrimination, homophobia, and transphobia. If Mike decides to run against Dan Patrick, he is ready to push forward on inclusive policies so every Texan feels safe, accepted, and free to be their authentic selves. **[We must continue the fight for a compassionate state that protects the rights of LGBTQ+ Texans. If you agree that we need to elect leadership that fights for everyone regardless of who they love or who they are, add your name to our petition today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30425432/289489832/600756746?refcode=mc-em-210607-pride&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzczYmYxZS1jZWM3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RhT-4twr7mbZDPXR4OskDdlgSBL7dxILrR5EkKQpRk4=&emci=65ffb318-cec7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8773bf1e-cec7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7689298)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30425433/289489833/600756746?refcode=mc-em-210607-pride&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzczYmYxZS1jZWM3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RhT-4twr7mbZDPXR4OskDdlgSBL7dxILrR5EkKQpRk4=&emci=65ffb318-cec7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8773bf1e-cec7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7689298)

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Ron Johnson wants to obstruct. I want to get sh*t done.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Hoo boy, am I fired up! (Keep reading for a surprise, Peter.)

This weekend, I had the chance to speak at the WisDems State Convention as we celebrated our 2020 victories in Wisconsin and looked ahead to 2022. We got to hear from President Joe Biden, Governor Tony Evers, Senator Tammy Baldwin, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, and so many others -- and the message was clear:

**Wisconsin will once again be a critical battleground state in 2022** , and we're going to have to work our tails off to make sure we don't lose ground -- especially with Ron Johnson's Senate seat up for grabs. **[Chip in to support our campaign as we work to defeat him>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30425571/289490213/1978118503?gpsid=50_130_19262&refcode=em21_210607_Cnvntn_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210607_Cnvntn_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGQ2OTM5Ny1jZWM3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lapRMjtTzPfctwcFHxQM59ldAjQHOuNMf2jt-PL3cJk=)**

Peter, I know I don't need to tell you this, but Ron Johnson has got to go. This guy cares more about conspiracy theories and Trumpism than Wisconsinites and working families.

He tried to block pandemic relief that would have helped unemployed Wisconsinites put food on the table or support our small businesses. **I mean, Ron Johnson single-handedly held up $1,400 checks. That's ridiculous!**

Meanwhile, Ron Johnson's flying on a private plane to D.C. saying, 'Wisconsinites don't need any help.' He's not just out of touch with Wisconsin, he's out of touch with reality -- and we deserve so much better.

**That's why I'm running against him.** And the truth is, I couldn't be more different! I was raised by two public school teachers in a union home, worked at Pizza Hut to pay for college, and unlike Ron Johnson, I think honesty is important.

I believe in science, which is why my first major action as Wisconsin's State Treasurer was lifting a Republican gag order that stopped us from even _talking_ about climate change. I'm a working mom, so I understand the importance of quality, affordable child care. And I know that _people_ , not big corporations, are our biggest asset.

**Ron Johnson wants to obstruct. I want to get sh*t done.** I am tired of Democrats being on defense. We need to go on offense and abolish the filibuster to pass historic voting rights legislation, critical police reform, and raise the minimum wage to a living wage.

This weekend made it clear that Wisconsin Democrats are ready to get back to work and finish what we started. Together, we've defeated Scott Walker, re-elected Tammy Baldwin, and put Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in the White House. Now, it's time to retire Ron Johnson.

**[If you're ready to finally get this guy out of the Senate, I hope you'll consider chipping in to our campaign. Every dollar makes a difference in a race that is sure to be one of the most competitive and expensive races in the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30425573/289490216/1978118503?gpsid=50_130_19262&refcode=em21_210607_Cnvntn_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210607_Cnvntn_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGQ2OTM5Ny1jZWM3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lapRMjtTzPfctwcFHxQM59ldAjQHOuNMf2jt-PL3cJk=)**

clean_body: Hoo boy, am I fired up! (Keep reading for a surprise, Peter.) This weekend, I had the chance to speak at the WisDems State Convention as we celebrated our 2020 victories in Wisconsin and looked ahead to 2022. We got to hear from President Joe Biden, Governor Tony Evers, Senator Tammy Baldwin, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, and so many others -- and the message was clear: Wisconsin will once again be a critical battleground state in 2022 , and we're going to have to work our tails off to make sure we don't lose ground -- especially with Ron Johnson's Senate seat up for grabs. = Peter, I know I don't need to tell you this, but Ron Johnson has got to go. This guy cares more about conspiracy theories and Trumpism than Wisconsinites and working families. He tried to block pandemic relief that would have helped unemployed Wisconsinites put food on the table or support our small businesses. I mean, Ron Johnson single-handedly held up $1,400 checks. That's ridiculous! Meanwhile, Ron Johnson's flying on a private plane to D.C. saying, 'Wisconsinites don't need any help.' He's not just out of touch with Wisconsin, he's out of touch with reality -- and we deserve so much better. That's why I'm running against him. And the truth is, I couldn't be more different! I was raised by two public school teachers in a union home, worked at Pizza Hut to pay for college, and unlike Ron Johnson, I think honesty is important. I believe in science, which is why my first major action as Wisconsin's State Treasurer was lifting a Republican gag order that stopped us from even talking about climate change. I'm a working mom, so I understand the importance of quality, affordable child care. And I know that people , not big corporations, are our biggest asset. Ron Johnson wants to obstruct. I want to get sht done. I am tired of Democrats being on defense. We need to go on offense and abolish the filibuster to pass historic voting rights legislation, critical police reform, and raise the minimum wage to a living wage. This weekend made it clear that Wisconsin Democrats are ready to get back to work and finish what we started. Together, we've defeated Scott Walker, re-elected Tammy Baldwin, and put Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in the White House. Now, it's time to retire Ron Johnson. =** Thank you for all you do, Sarah P.S. -- Here's the surprise I told you about... a Wisconsin Bloody Mary cheers! When two-thirds of the U.S. Senate are millionaires, no wonder we can’t pass any bills to benefit working families, but we can always pass tax breaks for the rich and corporations. name: Giffords.org
subject: Outraged
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
An AR-15 is not a swiss Army knife...plain and simple.
An AR-15 was the weapon used in Parkland, Las Vegas, Sandy Hook, and so many more tragedies.
If these attacks had been perpetrated by someone wielding a swiss army knife, there'd be a lot of Americans still alive today.
However, this past Friday, an extremist federal judge prioritized these weapons of war over the lives of Californians when he overturned California’s 32-year long assault weapons ban.
The families who have lost loved ones to these weapons of war can attest to the reality that these weapons are not like ‘swiss army knives’ nor are mass shootings only a ‘very small’ problem.
We are outraged by this misguided decision that has been influenced by the NRA. We are mobilizing nationwide to fight back against this ruling, because if it can happen in California it can happen anywhere.
[**So will you add your name today if you agree that one judge with extremist views shouldn’t be able to undo over 30 years of progress on commonsense gun safety? If enough of us speak out we can work to undo the damage done by this dangerous decision.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/ca_ban_petition?source=em210607-1-subs&t=1&akid=197%2E3935704%2EOpHe2l)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/ca_ban_petition?source=em210607-1-subs&t=2&akid=197%2E3935704%2EOpHe2l)**
The gun lobby continues to advance extreme positions on the Second Amendment in courts across the country, including the Supreme Court.
In the California lawsuit and many others, we’re keeping up the fight against the NRA’s reckless campaigns to strike down the laws that keep our families and communities safe.
Your support is what allows us to keep moving one foot in front of the other so we can keep up the fight and save lives — so thank you.
**We hope you’ll consider adding your name and speaking out with us today. You can use the link below to join the fight:**
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/Join-The-Fight**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/ca_ban_petition?source=em210607-1-subs&t=3&akid=197%2E3935704%2EOpHe2l)
Our very best,
Team Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=197%2E3935704%2EOpHe2l) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.
clean_body: Friends - An AR-15 is not a swiss Army knife...plain and simple. An AR-15 was the weapon used in Parkland, Las Vegas, Sandy Hook, and so many more tragedies. If these attacks had been perpetrated by someone wielding a swiss army knife, there'd be a lot of Americans still alive today. However, this past Friday, an extremist federal judge prioritized these weapons of war over the lives of Californians when he overturned California’s 32-year long assault weapons ban. The families who have lost loved ones to these weapons of war can attest to the reality that these weapons are not like ‘swiss army knives’ nor are mass shootings only a ‘very small’ problem. We are outraged by this misguided decision that has been influenced by the NRA. We are mobilizing nationwide to fight back against this ruling, because if it can happen in California it can happen anywhere. The gun lobby continues to advance extreme positions on the Second Amendment in courts across the country, including the Supreme Court. In the California lawsuit and many others, we’re keeping up the fight against the NRA’s reckless campaigns to strike down the laws that keep our families and communities safe. Your support is what allows us to keep moving one foot in front of the other so we can keep up the fight and save lives — so thank you. We hope you’ll consider adding your name and speaking out with us today. You can use the link below to join the fight: Our very best, Team Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Jay Jones
subject: Asking for your vote tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Jay Jones for Attorney General
body:
|
---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/LeP_B5npdy5vhCYw_N5ISKScFiHWWFD3_OakZmkjrMQ=/f5cCHCaZUl76eAspXLPVTrJLSwFylkFVhAISe6UWHww=)
---
Friend -- On the eve of the Democratic primary, I want to speak directly to you so you know what my candidacy for Attorney General is about. This campaign is about the future, not the past. It's about the Virginia we would like to create together. It's about being proactive - not reactive - and not blowing with the political winds. We need someone who will rise to meet this moment in our history and bring about true, equal justice in this Commonwealth. Governor Ralph Northam, former Attorney General Mary Sue Terry, Congresswoman Elaine Luria, Congressman Bobby Scott, and over 30 of my colleagues in the state legislature have endorsed my candidacy because they believe we have the vision and values to beat Republicans in November and reimagine this old office in a new way. I will rise to meet the demands of this moment and reach for the ceiling, not settle for the floor. _**I humbly ask for your vote in the Democratic primary tomorrow.**_ \- Jay Jones **P.S. Please make your plan to vote tonight. Head over to **[iwillvote.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/LeP_B5npdy5vhCYw_N5ISKScFiHWWFD3_OakZmkjrMQ=/OzTfFpelHFXLKfK90Trp0zGOD9_BRrzTFWti-6CS1qw=)** to check your registration status and find your polling location. Polls are open 6:00AM-7:00PM.**

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/LeP_B5npdy5vhCYw_N5ISKScFiHWWFD3_OakZmkjrMQ=/o_SPY3tDI3i_mXo-reCtEoLijRpN_eXN7CaRsZZkO4o=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/LeP_B5npdy5vhCYw_N5ISKScFiHWWFD3_OakZmkjrMQ=/0_LzShvErfLpCfRMYLjdNYnpgd7OaIISNpUMsPKENRw=)[](https://act.myngp.com/el/LeP_B5npdy5vhCYw_N5ISKScFiHWWFD3_OakZmkjrMQ=/mbyd5UOFplBjHW3zd2e2JrTHVrxXGunLfvppXr1mMrU=) | Paid for and authorized by Jay Jones for Attorney General

name: Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
subject: I'm not a coconut
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0c07f6e00a8a45e2b64b2aaea323d6fc&_e=4gr3ZUxeZEJM745g5FXhzIMuO3O2BKzPxn6T9W4CV17VVqP3ZpRPjItErWncXgCExzVP1KJRLlNV_O51rTuDCax92-WrjD6NJmk9zwla7TRG260yoGn7s1Q8Gr2IeLvncjPFHr3rY_xlwhcCyCdC4zYSeTcYG99dneh_iirbs7c0wRK4nuyuvhx3dEBJNPOPb10JHaWhvi_vQa7oeCUrVFZo4s37fFE60k2UcJ6SnXAGDKI3w1wTMAvfIKH8J8ZNl7QrTLzKbV6mcPUMgXNtBkE6r2SdHlMaqj9KFAI5LFZLr7cGpiIHm_xbolJ_9ANSiC08_8sGiV3pEpcL9F7k0Q5VuZDJLLw5oakdqIArPYnbKaJzZxIfXD3nK77crdS1SbFCaRis7x7q8CcK7RU_kgRidM19Go6jiILK6VS17TG9MZc5Zw3qeg5zf74A-0ZEcNVLGS0gsop9EUfXz_DFZzB93QQgm07CQcdY6MuMhYM%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Latinos were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Latino,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, **a proud Latina Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0c07f6e00a8a45e2b64b2aaea323d6fc&_e=4gr3ZUxeZEJM745g5FXhzIMuO3O2BKzPxn6T9W4CV17VVqP3ZpRPjItErWncXgCExzVP1KJRLlNV_O51rTuDCax92-WrjD6NJmk9zwla7TRG260yoGn7s1Q8Gr2IeLvncjPFHr3rY_xlwhcCyCdC4zYSeTcYG99dneh_iirbs7c0wRK4nuyuvhx3dEBJNPOPb10JHaWhvi_vQa7oeCUrVFZo4s37fFE60k2UcJ6SnXAGDKI3w1wTMAvfIKH8J8ZNl7QrTLzKbV6mcPUMgXNtBoz4WCSiK2Tgat3AIe7drXP511-py7Gy0uYfeyyuLR8CxFk9UNTIlQ8hXoawikKEHrFfu-RgbAfiE3neWZ5kKqwrOk_Hpt2X_pMQ62_A4-ejFHWxW5f_D4dU6zOcIFQDw6ZhnRNy5B-Qabirnrr0gOuwu7OnPZd9WSrCbR9SGpesvzCLI0V2G4plvHhua12RVez_4mkeWttKscNyePXv-mE%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS⇒ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0c07f6e00a8a45e2b64b2aaea323d6fc&_e=4gr3ZUxeZEJM745g5FXhzIMuO3O2BKzPxn6T9W4CV17VVqP3ZpRPjItErWncXgCExzVP1KJRLlNV_O51rTuDCax92-WrjD6NJmk9zwla7TRG260yoGn7s1Q8Gr2IeLvncjPFHr3rY_xlwhcCyCdC4zYSeTcYG99dneh_iirbs7c0wRK4nuyuvhx3dEBJNPOPb10JHaWhvi_vQa7oeCUrVFZo4s37fFE60k2UcJ6SnXAGDKI3w1wTMAvfIKH8J8ZNl7QrTLzKbV6mcPUMgXNtBv2es0HSBzUSC6Y4k9lxBshCuqxw7IGEr9HYwLB2yHv8MmYKGHtycRMUYqO2Djpnwd35mF6nyE4ObkkEOi9NpCRL-NE-BHHkR7C1_hgjlOgjzdpupM-953xfqBq2SFYcUPELJJ26kbfCRVI8rkCwoyQbDI_QtSqy98AEaZIy8nmfNWqg4_3Ek_cxeJrhqExgluVXXvN8na3HOs-J5Q8uu6c%3D)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Latinos?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0c07f6e00a8a45e2b64b2aaea323d6fc&_e=4gr3ZUxeZEJM745g5FXhzIMuO3O2BKzPxn6T9W4CV17VVqP3ZpRPjItErWncXgCExzVP1KJRLlNV_O51rTuDCax92-WrjD6NJmk9zwla7TRG260yoGn7s1Q8Gr2IeLvncjPFHr3rY_xlwhcCyCdC4zYSeTcYG99dneh_iirbs7c0wRK4nuyuvhx3dEBJNPOPb10JHaWhvi_vQa7oeCUrVFZo4s37fFE60k2UcJ6SnXAGDKI3w1wTMAvfIKH8J8ZNl7QrTLzKbV6mcPUMgXNtBpGnNv-Edd8jfm4nOzMgPL6f9v7NzfcOOYEZJa1_Vyfg2um7O8stVKllqjuqjbq3g3NxQ2bpOraw43hy3lWVr4txRRy1v2xfLy0-wVdgwfn2Bu6INr3milHwDDj5OluCMdsQ5eLRg_RzQIBhHHbox-1w0mHu6XB3rbmIOpkYcHDtfAOBu_79z8AsmrzXbeFujziRLKetv7hwXJtF5_tjp9U%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS ⇒ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0c07f6e00a8a45e2b64b2aaea323d6fc&_e=4gr3ZUxeZEJM745g5FXhzIMuO3O2BKzPxn6T9W4CV17VVqP3ZpRPjItErWncXgCExzVP1KJRLlNV_O51rTuDCax92-WrjD6NJmk9zwla7TRG260yoGn7s1Q8Gr2IeLvncjPFHr3rY_xlwhcCyCdC4zYSeTcYG99dneh_iirbs7c0wRK4nuyuvhx3dEBJNPOPb10JHaWhvi_vQa7oeCUrVFZo4s37fFE60k2UcJ6SnXAGDKI3w1wTMAvfIKH8J8ZNl7QrTLzKbV6mcPUMgXNtBg09e3JHZ0184iytg1agx9iDO6CXQ_ndJ1dvWuAXR1X6ey0bfwFuVFV51E5b8QIWO4b3y_UvGE5Od84NkM-FJYlsIsXWWX6Zi5b2CdZLplLveRzJDf3iciH4k4OYHLBmoc6XlsAFAxowz9aqzfyBarijAqg-WG_Vh1QROifa4RGF2EKTWTKuvk2YHWLcLSl-IpC6GajequeY4jPWzCW5BWg%3D)
Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0c07f6e00a8a45e2b64b2aaea323d6fc&_e=4gr3ZUxeZEJM745g5FXhzIMuO3O2BKzPxn6T9W4CV17VVqP3ZpRPjItErWncXgCExzVP1KJRLlNV_O51rTuDCax92-WrjD6NJmk9zwla7TRG260yoGn7s1Q8Gr2IeLvncjPFHr3rY_xlwhcCyCdC4zYSeTcYG99dneh_iirbs7c0wRK4nuyuvhx3dEBJNPOPb10JHaWhvi_vQa7oeCUrVFZo4s37fFE60k2UcJ6SnXAGDKI3w1wTMAvfIKH8J8ZNl7QrTLzKbV6mcPUMgXNtBsZllWVSE5D2D8HQ26T0_-UkeIaY7lDPUm8PMn2GkaZJ6BeNkHuwld0ladayf7A-41Zx1N_uTryIeG4h7-9Z_xVy9dn8vaPeXvRqruERtWb4dptY3MwlN-fEGRkr9vaSS9m7TbDRuE7DQh5Q2vVxpQo9Irj8iwa-wU9kOwY3FqFiVJ-kydgkXNVh2aWo4-FhWjNIZySQ-VvOOTtY9YwWmmY%3D)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
Republican for Congress

[ Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0c07f6e00a8a45e2b64b2aaea323d6fc&_e=4gr3ZUxeZEJM745g5FXhzIMuO3O2BKzPxn6T9W4CV17VVqP3ZpRPjItErWncXgCExzVP1KJRLlNV_O51rTuDCax92-WrjD6NJmk9zwla7TRG260yoGn7s1Q8Gr2IeLvncjPFHr3rY_xlwhcCyCdC4zYSeTcYG99dneh_iirbs7c0wRK4nuyuvhx3dEBJNPOPb10JHaWhvi_vQa7oeCUrVFZo4s37fFE60k2UcJ6SnXAGDKI3w1wTMAvfIKH8J8ZNl7QrTLzKbV6mcPUMgXNtBhq4EmgEvtsZa80hIgEimFmU2XQup3DaKhr1e1IBbuYJ802xdqaeIPFvtYQjOPZyWKHx8g_6TN98OzQVvBcJhXsSz14EvKKiN6Lazs7B4gKfFkJOOL3JeOz8kPjP1vZWy3PhXAW0lCkBewIXACx8MwStPhnGwpux41DyZq80-6bZZ9Hsy7udkGn9E0RqK0HWNke7G82wrYyAzd5kV1S5UD8%3D)

| Paid for by Monica for Congress
