[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30428589/289500199/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjllZWU1Ny1kOGM3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DyOqJwDTFOWtfZIJ-4GSC57p4LLXyVN1ax4gOlE5syg=&emci=8f300a51-d8c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d69eee57-d8c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

We have come a long way on achieving rights for LGBTQ folks. After all, it has only been 13 years since Prop 8 passed here in California banning marriage equality.

But this Pride Month, I am reflecting on just how far we have to go, in part due to elected leaders like Mike Garcia.

Earlier in February, Mike voted against the Equality Act, a hugely important piece of federal legislation that would provide long-overdue civil rights protections for LGBTQ Americans.

This bill passed the House in February -- no thanks to Mike Garcia -- and now needs to pass the Senate so President Biden can sign it into law.

**[Can you add your name right now to call on the Senate to pass the Equality Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30428591/289500202/-563858338?ms=em21_210607_EqualityAct-s3&refcode=em21_210607_EqualityAct-s3&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjllZWU1Ny1kOGM3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DyOqJwDTFOWtfZIJ-4GSC57p4LLXyVN1ax4gOlE5syg=&emci=8f300a51-d8c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d69eee57-d8c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)**

Frustratingly, 29 states lack basic civil rights protections for LGBTQ Americans -- and we are seeing a concerted and coordinated effort by the far right to infringe on their civil rights, degrade their personhood, and deny them health care. And don’t get me started on the attacks on trans kids.

The Equality Act would prevent discrimination in our housing, education, public services, and lending systems -- and much more. It would provide much-needed and long-awaited protections for folks across the country.

**[It just needs to pass the Senate. Can you add your name to show how much support there is for a swift passage of the Equality Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30428595/289500205/-563858338?ms=em21_210607_EqualityAct-s3&refcode=em21_210607_EqualityAct-s3&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjllZWU1Ny1kOGM3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DyOqJwDTFOWtfZIJ-4GSC57p4LLXyVN1ax4gOlE5syg=&emci=8f300a51-d8c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d69eee57-d8c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)**

Thanks,

Christy Smith [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30428597/289500206/-1772004339?refcode=em21_210607_EqualityAct-s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjllZWU1Ny1kOGM3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DyOqJwDTFOWtfZIJ-4GSC57p4LLXyVN1ax4gOlE5syg=)

It's your final chance to support New Hampshire Republicans before tomorrow's election.

New Hampshire Republicans need your support!

[Help our local candidates, before it is too late!](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Fdonate/2/01000179e79c2ec8-668a508f-4da5-4c2c-bf86-db45d3801f73-000000/dTlJcjsw0yBlHLl54aXD3g3KhLo=217)

Tomorrow is voting day for a crucial State Representative special election in Bow & Dunbarton. Our majority in the New Hampshire house is slim, and we need every vote we can get.

Our candidate Chris Lins has been working hard to flip the seat from blue to red.

[Help him get over the line, and add to our majority in Concord.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Fdonate/3/01000179e79c2ec8-668a508f-4da5-4c2c-bf86-db45d3801f73-000000/hvmzVnsl30_DadtfvbEGipdz4pg=217)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Fauci Should be Ashamed of Himself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bio Weapon |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2c5d4559ad&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

You know, one of the reasons I back Gov. DeSantis to the hilt, is how he tells Biden and Fauci to stuff it, when it comes to draconian COVID measures they promote.

Today, we found out that Fauci had been lying the whole time. He had no idea what to do, and his counsel is tainted.

It's time to fire Fauci!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b468dd2449&e=afa21b7626) \- Florida’s 9th District, held by a Dem career politician. I nearly shocked the political world by coming close to beating him last year, and I intend to finish the job this time!**

Have you seen some of these bombshells? He showed political favoritism for Cuomo and against DeSantis:

_An email dated March 19, 2020, revealed more about how the media darling viewed his commentator duties as well as his tattletale style of dealing with state leaders who didn't go along with his "scientific" guidance, providing fodder for Democrats and their media allies to drag DeSantis while turning a blind eye to New York. It's worth noting that Fauci's emails do not contain similar disdain for New York Governor Andrew Cuomo whose mishandling of COVID led to the deaths of nursing home residents.

"Regarding the bars and beaches, I have been screaming on TV 2 to 5 times per night to tell the younger generation to start taking this seriously. I am very surprised that Gov. DeSantis has not completely closed the bars, even if they serve food... I will bring this up at the Task Force meeting tomorrow."_

He lied to people about the effectiveness of masks:

_Townhall also reported on the communications with individuals and media outlets in which Fauci advised against mask wearing for travel, told a medical school dean not to mandate masks, and stated the flimsy masks most Americans were forced to wear were ineffective at stopping the spread of Wuhan coronavirus.

"'Masks are really for infected people to prevent them from spreading infection to people who are not infected rather than protecting uninfected people from acquiring infection,' he said. 'The typical mask you buy in the drug store is not really effective in keeping out virus, which is small enough to pass through the material.' Fauci concluded, saying 'I do not recommend that you wear a mask' to travel by air."_

He also was told the virus was engineered.... but ignored it:

_As Katie reported, Fauci "was told by NIH scientist Kristian Andersen on January 31, 2020, that Wuhan coronavirus looked 'potentially engineered.' In other words, it was manipulated in a lab through gain of function research."

"And yet, that's not what he said publicly as he rejected the possibility of a lab leak in interviews, during testimony to Congress and during official White House Task Force briefings. On April 18, 2020, three months after being told the virus looked engineered, Fauci told reporters at the White House, unequivocally, it didn't come from a lab. Most of the media then reported his remarks as 'debunking' a conspiracy theory."_

This guy lied to us about masks, lied to us about the origin of the virus, and used his position to play political favorites.

_With what we know how, how could we take him seriously? He's the highest paid person in the Federal Government. He must be fired._
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=63a3c7e284&e=afa21b7626)
---
| __**I am proud to have backed Gov. DeSantis against this fraud Fauci. We need to stand for freedom. I didn't spend my whole life in service to this country, just to have my freedom taken away by some incompetent bureaucrat.**__

**Right now, the Republicans are the only ones standing against Marxism. We need to stand firm and demand Fauci's resignation.**

_Help me get to Congress, and I'll be a thorn in the side of the Socialists from day one!_

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Democrat. _I gave him the scare of his life- but now they know I'm coming, and I need your help to finish the job!_

We need strong leadership now. [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b8e1fa2a59&e=afa21b7626)

The Dems must go! [Help me restore our freedoms and protect our freedoms!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9791398c96&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e06e032d90&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=4f9b111103&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=613ba9cef9&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

We know the Democrats want this seat. Last week I made a call to action with a lofty goal of adding **365 new donors** to our grassroots army before June 7th. **I’ve been overwhelmed with the response so far, but my treasurer tells me we are still short of our goal. ** I know it seems like a long way off, but I guarantee Nancy Pelosi and liberal strategists in D.C. are already talking about flipping my seat next November. | | Hello Peter, The GOP blocked the bipartisan January 6 commission with the filibuster. But we still have a chance to learn the full truth. **CBS: House Democrats seek ways to investigate January 6 after Senate Republicans block commission** Speaker Pelosi can sidestep Republican obstruction and set up a House investigation on her own. That would give us the chance to learn exactly who worked with the insurrectionists and subpoena public testimony from those who know the truth. **We cannot let the GOP hide from their guilt, and the truth cannot wait.** So we have to ask: **Should Nancy Pelosi move forward with a January 6 investigation in the House?** | **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30430826/289507534/1952704642?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE5MWNlYWU3LWRmYzctZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=APwFhEerZYQkMAvp2LWnzQUcPUp4bqYXYT_AsN8uHTI=&emci=21bee666-9cc7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=191ceae7-dfc7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)** | | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30430827/289507535/1952704642?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE5MWNlYWU3LWRmYzctZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=APwFhEerZYQkMAvp2LWnzQUcPUp4bqYXYT_AsN8uHTI=&emci=21bee666-9cc7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=191ceae7-dfc7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)**
---|---|---

Thank you for letting us know how you feel. It is critical that we learn the full truth about this assault on our democracy.

\- When Democrats Turn Out

**[TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30430828/289507536/1952704642?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE5MWNlYWU3LWRmYzctZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=APwFhEerZYQkMAvp2LWnzQUcPUp4bqYXYT_AsN8uHTI=&emci=21bee666-9cc7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=191ceae7-dfc7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)**

P.S. It's been nearly half a year since the insurrection, and we still don't know the full role that Trump officials and even members of Congress played in the attack on our democracy. **There is no time to wait. body:
I’m humbly asking for your support as Attorney General, as the People’s Lawyer, to continue protecting and expanding the rights of ALL Virginians. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30430855/289507617/-1309710229?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjc5MWYwNS1lMGM3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_fQwWpErUeDsIUiuIuHVcDu0SEx_BM7vmHPovSfIb1k=&emci=aeba5e7d-dec7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c6791f05-e0c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=9499186) | My fellow Virginians, In a year of almost unimaginable challenges, we’ve actually all come together. And through it all, we’ve heard Virginians say we have to keep the progress going. _I know that we won’t go back._ **Together, we’ll work to keep you and your community safe, fighting policies that fuel racism, hate and violence, because we believe in justice for ALL Virginians.** That means dismantling systemic racism, expanding opportunity and holding law enforcement accountable to the communities they serve. As your Attorney General, I’ve led big fights for marriage equality, for DREAMers, and to protect Obamacare. I’ve done the first ever investigation of racial bias in a Virginia school system, cleared our backlog of untested rape kits, and took on the epidemics of sexual violence, gun violence, opioid addiction and white supremacy. **Together we have fought some big fights. Because these are the fights that matter.** _And you know the attacks on our rights won’t stop._ That’s why I’m humbly asking for your support as Attorney General, as the People’s Lawyer, to continue protecting and expanding the rights of ALL Virginians. The election is tomorrow. Please make a plan to get out and vote! \-- Mark Herring

name: Mike Gallagher
subject: It’s not reform. It’s a partisan power grab.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin |
body:
The Democratic Party is now controlled by radical fringe voices who want the Supreme Court to be nothing more than a rubber stamp for their agenda [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=4ae375c4082241f681580bcf1aca7fd3&_e=aQ8wjr4375kdqm0_8b3iSh1tb-Knc87fLqXbVzB52kXfXcW7B1DzgCVvQLVbQkau2P1Fw_WSf03nafynMGyrb6k2HbGLA-jpiOZLrYrF1nmz1MMflbB47mI1iNYJ30zJOOJ_iGGQH8UgfmQIHXvsm_1x5tS0yAPxqtf2K9zjRDjREJ70l-tr0NRFyqp_Ms03hTdaSdzwhpmF1ZNBBwaJbBT6rAFAIEeLMN2RxfjGR-eaq8Uak76xV-fg9XSsdKBDrmqAvNfck1H1SaPtHdRH46zsEGEfL7h0a1S3nRXhLP4fuHpDy5rhU3C8VYGylba1LqR-OIHgv0KY_pSAnAmcg0uus7Ypton13lWfgl6rVw1y-DRUf5aYVrMhHFtvM47oiTIwxBoXvOnmeiWg9YdeyFnUUDQtFF6yJdOnUsI2DX1l9zo4ApU5n3IZ1d5To1U4JbVaKYUPVlkf2zk6p5j6UvJnsvD2GLdXqlZ9GATFiAStbAuKvce0qtkx3wid_GjX) Peter, Even though Democrats are in charge of the House, the Senate, and the White House, they’re still hungry for more power. _That’s why they’re relentlessly pushing to dismantle the filibuster and put control over our elections in the pocket of the federal government._ And that’s not all. **Democrats have also introduced a bill in Congress that would expand the Supreme Court from 9 to 13 justices.** President Biden even joined the court packing bandwagon by creating a Supreme Court commission that’s actively exploring ways to expand the court under the guise of “reform.” It’s clear why this is happening, Peter. The Democratic Party is now controlled by _radical fringe voices_ who want the Supreme Court to be nothing more than a rubber stamp for their agenda when it fails to materialize on Capitol Hill. **_ADD YOUR NAME:[REJECT DEMOCRAT COURT PACKING](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=4ae375c4082241f681580bcf1aca7fd3&_e=aQ8wjr4375kdqm0_8b3iSh1tb-Knc87fLqXbVzB52kXfXcW7B1DzgCVvQLVbQkau2P1Fw_WSf03nafynMGyrb6k2HbGLA-jpiOZLrYrF1nmz1MMflbB47mI1iNYJ30zJOOJ_iGGQH8UgfmQIHXvsm_1x5tS0yAPxqtf2K9zjRDjREJ70l-tr0NRFyqp_Ms03hTdaSdzwhpmF1ZNBBwaJbBT6rAFAIEeLMN2RxfjGR-eaq8Uak76xV-fg9XSsdKBDrmqAvNfck1H1SaPtHdRH46zsEGEfL7h0a1S3nRXhLP70pwXTfSRpBodLFertZpR99Bd_2cz7cQ-VBuub-6sUdocpQfJzPk_BjC5ai8x8S19uLGz9dxrYdsr-RVxtjK1xidlnA5CVf2mQ1MmYGrkBKYDwZt25LVQfnnH5puD4m81O87SSoDNKPbUA__1BDeFnCdLygYdshhFAzKyNnM3vfEtydxDBBWcEDeqZPM-ya6UWRwkJn94NgBJUz7Ca_uD-)_** Packing the court would take a hammer to 150 years of precedent and effectively destroy our constitutional republic. This is a reckless and short-sighted partisan move that will only further divide our nation and government. We can’t let it happen. Not now. Not ever. **Peter, if you agree that court packing is wrong for America, please**[**click here to sign my petition rejecting this power grab.**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=4ae375c4082241f681580bcf1aca7fd3&_e=aQ8wjr4375kdqm0_8b3iSh1tb-Knc87fLqXbVzB52kXfXcW7B1DzgCVvQLVbQkau2P1Fw_WSf03nafynMGyrb6k2HbGLA-jpiOZLrYrF1nmz1MMflbB47mI1iNYJ30zJOOJ_iGGQH8UgfmQIHXvsm_1x5tS0yAPxqtf2K9zjRDjREJ70l-tr0NRFyqp_Ms03hTdaSdzwhpmF1ZNBBwaJbBT6rAFAIEeLMN2RxfjGR-eaq8Uak76xV-fg9XSsdKBDrmqAvNfck1H1SaPtHdRH46zsEGEfL7h0a1S3nRXhLP6QcPv0-thgda8p6zT7LYQ85ymxgz5trufQNq4bkM6beOEAKlFpPdwGt7FupjYs_Nt2lBycw7f8of7dH67_7mgUwlrzWItVCOII84cXRyFhkEsyJWxIhlkLwnnuJQoJeNW9aMf5crZjYoDKZ4b-k8tKKqkztD_VmHu63tjyCTyz6wwX0aNDXHyTYrMjOm07AuIuWnrcZQXAPHY4w2bJjs22) Thank you,

Mike Gallagher | |

name: Senator Jim Inhofe
subject: Did you see this headline??
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JIM INHOFE
body:
| | |

| | **Friend,** **An Air Force Lieutenant Colonel is getting silenced because he said members of our military should speak out against Marxism... THIS IS OUTRAGEOUS.** **Our men and women in the Armed Forces risk their lives to protect OUR DEMOCRACY. We shouldn’t be punishing them for speaking out against an ideology that goes against everything our country stands for. Ronald Reagan stood up against Marxism famously saying how it belongs “on the ash-heap of history”. ** [****STAND WITH THE ARMED FORCES****](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/1fZAIb5hOGuD2eF7VtC017) **I am concerned that the only reason they are doing this is because he was a conservative. The bias against Republicans is growing, and not even members of the military are immune from the pressure. We owe it to our military to protect them against unfair treatment like this! ** [****STAND WITH THE ARMED FORCES****](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/1fZMewon8VlP8ore2WIeX4) **Thank you for your support, ** **Jim Inhofe**

**In our fight against Devin Nunes, every dollar you give makes a huge difference.** As our campaign ramps up, _I can personally assure you that every cent given goes directly toward:_
* Exposing Devin Nunes’s horrible record in Congress
* Getting our message out and funding our campaign-winning digital ads
* Funding our mobilization efforts to contact as many voters as possible

body:
Friend,

name: Erica Smith
subject: 🚨 Donald Trump endorsed Ted Budd
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Donald Trump officially entered North Carolina’s U.S. Senate race when he gave his "complete and total" endorsement to our Republican opponent (and insurrection apologist) Ted Budd.
#
**On Saturday, Donald Trump officially entered North Carolina’s U.S. Senate race when he gave his "complete and total" endorsement to our Republican opponent (_and insurrection apologist_) Ted Budd.**
[**I’m asking you directly to rush a $5 contribution to my campaign so that we can have the resources to stop Donald Trump and his hand-picked candidate, Ted Budd.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2336?refcode=em20210607-146&t=1&akid=146%2E3698%2Emr8EZq)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2336?refcode=em20210607-146&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=146%2E3698%2Emr8EZq)**
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2336?refcode=em20210607-146&t=21&akid=146%2E3698%2Emr8EZq)
Ted Budd is a dangerous extremist who has demonstrated complete loyalty to Donald Trump and the Trump crime family — it’s NO surprise Trump is throwing his full support behind him.
Donald Trump’s early endorsement makes it clear: Our race is the MOST important U.S. Senate race in the country, and the GOP will say, do, and spend whatever it takes to win.
[**I need your help right now more than ever before. Will you rush a $5 contribution to help us fight back against Donald Trump and Ted Budd and flip North Carolina’s Senate seat blue in 2022?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2336?refcode=em20210607-146&t=22&akid=146%2E3698%2Emr8EZq)
Donald Trump is with Ted Budd. The people are with our movement for a North Carolina that works for everyone — and with your support, we’ll win this race.
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210607-146-footer&t=23&refcode2=146_3698_mr8EZq&akid=146%2E3698%2Emr8EZq)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

name: The Mississippi Republican Party
subject: TOMORROW is Election Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mississippi Republican Party
body:
Tomorrow is Election Day in Mississippi. We are reminding you to get out and vote for Republicans in critical local races across our state. | |
---
Republican,
**Tomorrow is Election Day in Mississippi.** We are reminding you to get out and vote for Republicans in critical local races across our state.

**_If we start losing local elections to Liberals, Mississippi will become a Blue state._**

We cannot afford to lose our freedoms and liberties to big-government Democrats, socialists, and career politicians who want the federal government in charge of our lives.

**We need American Patriots like _YOU_ to get out and vote, remind your friends and family members, and bring a few with you to the polling place.**
[**Find your polling location _HERE_.**](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=6e6f69e98e56485c94c914c8a2bc395b&_e=zXFn0wQkfaG8lc9Ct-W80Df3ElBrgkfkTg84JpFbkaXvHON0Th4LcyfyFG_WgIq4YisbwNcwsGuptDUWCZ0WcUUSahc4GjjbyA0fMbOPAQ9EyZaZnuHSNSVQzSB6spXhpKDmAZ1cQ2LQ6RyrLQRDNGZmslir-tkAP4e99PkviKAyCF0gfdxHP-_M951Tx8wWQR1OIUJuLq7BJ1j8QLIYDavZNJBawWd9zykJMcIhaLNBHfMY-Vi2ug-0mJpJzXVtEttj8VVa8VIfnaH8tHc5Cus96FcrcrGHfgODrCjHjSosK92nEC6CESpQd9uzi2TyEW-MufsAHzfO1q90DwmWwA9XkCSRfJvRHV0VW2ZMa-8%3D)
Democrat politicians are starving for power and eager to spend your hard-earned money. Today in Washington, Liberals are wasting trillions of dollars to expand the size and role of government in this country. Mississippi needs your help to keep these ludicrous policies out of our state and keep her **RED**!

**_Our way of life is at stake_. Every vote counts tomorrow. GO VOTE!**

And if you can give, please consider a donation below. Any amount will make a difference and will go directly to supporting Republican candidates in their high-stake races tomorrow.
[**_DONATE HERE_**](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=6e6f69e98e56485c94c914c8a2bc395b&_e=zXFn0wQkfaG8lc9Ct-W80F0Qnaf_vlL_R8bf2a2RXdO_QAU15hl3N0tLyYsBHtB4n8-ZnqwDnrCEbmLdzdj4XbGXmMwcsOtlNZaJDa9-8iuf0v3RmC6z7ZyRuRMgltuWSl0OwAgkCgPaxWElvDWWK0iEVF1FOBH4lG6de-Rb1lY354E91MUNE_SQSlb3r5ZoAe4BrrQQ8nrdmptmaAEAnWL8JhC_okFQg_mxU39wmykyteV6vkGYmYhn2gOrqClepq42MJT3ozKWQ9o6bQRmuPHw02jU60GukPa3-d5vjdR-7altM_If0Fe0xSx-52eQ9qpkoe9yBtwA-na4VG7OomymYDPtZHtS9Hn94WEQQtrJfiwYiC5G1FkAbikzjCCk)
Thank you,

The Mississippi Republican Party

name: NH Senate Republicans
subject: A Budget that Works for NH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Chuck Morse Chairman
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzAzMDk2MDc0MzI0OTQwNTQ1JmM9ZDF3OSZlPTE5MjgmYj02MTg4MTY5NzYmZD1sNnE2ajRp.uo7AXeNCULF-rYJCuwEr7UZGXSVtDFrIqhEHolsPNts)
| | | |
---
---
| |
---
| Friends, This past week, the NH Senate Republicans passed our fiscally conservative, responsible state budget. The Senate Republican budget **addresses New Hampshire's most pressing needs while ****cutting business and property taxes** for Granite Staters. We are very proud of all of the hard work that went into this budget and are very happy to share some of the highlights with you. Check out our video about the budget below:
---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzAzMDk2MDc0MzI0OTQwNTQ1JmM9ZDF3OSZlPTE5MjgmYj02MTg4MTY5OTEmZD1zNHcweDlj.n2N_-AH0M0xjUSZURAinzB0z5rvb-vNCP4p36sVUgUQ)
---
| |
---
| **Highlights of the Senate budget include:** **Taxpayers**
* Provides property tax relief to every New Hampshire homeowner
* Lowers taxes on New Hampshire’s small businesses
* Phases out Interest & Dividends Tax to help seniors and the disabled

**Property Taxes**
* Sends $100M directly back to property taxpayers
* Sends an additional $188M from Meals & Rooms revenue back to cities and towns for property tax relief – an increase of $50.5M over the last budget
* For the first time, puts 30% of revenues from the Meals & Rooms Tax into a dedicated Trust Fund for distribution to cities and towns

**Small Business**
* Cuts business taxes (BET and BPT) and increases threshold for BET filing
* Reduces Meals & Rooms Tax for first time in decades
* Exempts Paycheck Protection Program(PPP) loans from state taxation

**Public Safety**
* Makes investments in Granite Shield, which continues to work on drug trafficking interdiction aimed at preventing the supply of illegal drugs from entering NH
* Funds the Commission on Law Enforcement Accountability, Community, and Transparency recommendations for body cameras, which reduce complaints filed against police officers and provide evidence when an incident occurs
* Provides $500,000 for Internet Crimes Against Children Fund

**Education**
* Creates Education Freedom Accounts to give low-income New Hampshire families more choices for their children’s education
* Corrects education funding formula to ensure schools are not hurt by COVID enrollment drop, providing $67M in additional aid
* Provides $30M for school Building Aid
* Reserves $35M in Education Relief Aid for schools most in need
* Fund’s Governor’s Scholarship Fund
* Increases funding to towns that expand to full-day Kindergarten

**Protecting our Environment**
* Provides $15.6M for state aid grants to keep our water clean
* Consolidates Public Utilities Commission and Office of Strategic Initiative into a new Department of Energy to guide energy policy decisions such as development of offshore wind power

**Substance Misuse**
* Continues to build on the progress made in combating the opioid crisis
* Provides over $100M in funding to address substance abuse

**Mental Health**
* Fully funds new forensic psychiatric hospital to free up beds at the NH Hospital and transfer patients from the secure psychiatric unit at the state prison
* Funds transitional beds to reduce emergency room mental health boarding crisis
* Provides $8M for community mental health programs and mobile crisis teams
* Fully funds the Developmentally Disabled Wait List
* Provides $3M to help veterans and seniors recover from social isolation of the COVID-19 pandemic.

**Seniors**
* Eliminates Interest & Dividends Tax on retirement savings
* Increases funding for Senior Support Services
* Provides $1.5M to help seniors recover from social isolation of the COVID-19 pandemic.

**Capital Budget**
* Funds state projects all across NH
* Leverages $25M in additional federal funds to address more projects, reducing future costs

**Veterans**
* Increases funding for Veterans Support Services
* Creates National Guard Enlistment Incentive Program
* Provides $1.5M to help veterans recover from social isolation of the COVID-19 pandemic.

**Affordable Housing**
* Adds $25M to the Affordable Housing Fund, leveraging an estimated $300M in additional private investment
* Continues current affordable housing funds through Real Estate Transfer Tax
* Provides $100 million in direct tax relief for property taxpayers

---
---
| |
---
| | [Show your support for the NH Senate Republican Budget by contributing to our campaign fund! (secure link)](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzAzMDk2MDc0MzI0OTQwNTQ1JmM9ZDF3OSZlPTE5MjgmYj02MTg4MTcwMzAmZD1tOXE3aTd5.dgPLO2R93qJjs-R1Pi9pcFL-nQqj8Zlm9ThPRHA8kWc)
---
---
| |
---
| Unsurprisingly, **Senate Democrats attempted to load this budget with out of control spending proposals and new tax increases** , but we were able to fight back against each of their proposals and create a budget that truly works for New Hampshire! Will you help us fight back against the Democrats' distortions and false accusations about this budget? name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: My response (Joe Manchin)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We can’t stop fighting for our democracy.
#
Peter,
Senator Joe Manchin announced yesterday that he would vote AGAINST historic voting rights legislation AND oppose ending the filibuster so we can deliver for the people. He is putting the idea of bipartisanship — which Republicans have long abandoned — ahead of passing the For The People Act and protecting our democracy.
With Republicans passing dozens of coordinated voter suppression efforts in states across the country and doing everything they can to make it harder for people to vote, we can’t stop fighting to protect our democracy.
[**That’s why I’m asking: Do you agree with Joe Manchin or will you make a donation today to support my work to pass the For The People Act, end the filibuster, and preserve our democracy?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210607?refcode=em20210607-352&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&refcode2=352_420207_iD1mOJ&akid=352%2E420207%2EiD1mOJ)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210607?refcode=em20210607-352&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=352_420207_iD1mOJ&akid=352%2E420207%2EiD1mOJ)**
From Georgia and Texas to Florida and states across America, Republicans are working overtime to restrict the right to vote. There is a clear, urgent, and popular solution: Passing the For the People Act. But we only have a few months to get it done in time for the 2022 elections. And with Joe Manchin, the filibuster, and Trump-Republicans in our way, we must put the pressure on right now.
Voters delivered us the House, the Senate, and the White House. Now, we must do everything in our power to protect voting rights — and our democracy. **It’s clear: Senate Democrats MUST pass the For the People Act. Let’s build the grassroots movement to make it happen before it’s too late.**
[**Chip in an urgent donation of $3 or more today to fuel our fight to end the filibuster and pass the critical For The People Act. We don’t have time to waste.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210607?refcode=em20210607-352&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=39&refcode2=352_420207_iD1mOJ&akid=352%2E420207%2EiD1mOJ)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210607?refcode=em20210607-352&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=40&refcode2=352_420207_iD1mOJ&akid=352%2E420207%2EiD1mOJ)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210607-352-footer&t=41&refcode2=352_420207_iD1mOJ&akid=352%2E420207%2EiD1mOJ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=42&akid=352%2E420207%2EiD1mOJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=43&akid=352%2E420207%2EiD1mOJ)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Got some support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Support is rolling in |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a91dd3a919&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am a proud Republican, a former cop, first responder, paramedic, and business leader. Most importantly and proudly, I am the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative.

**I have spearheaded a large grassroots movement to undertake “America’s Audit” in Maricopa County, where every day we are uncovering evidence of systemic election fraud in the 2020 election.**

_We are trailblazing a path that will lead to greater scrutiny in key swing states with huge systemic election fraud in 2020, like Georgia, Pennsylvania, and Michigan._

**But the fight does not end there. We have a long road ahead of us.**

**Proving there is systemic election fraud is not enough.**

**_We need to oust the fraudsters._**

And that means Republicans taking over key elected offices.

**This is why I am writing you today. [I urgently need your support as I am running for Secretary of State of Arizona where I will personally oversee election integrity in Arizona!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=53033ce9e9&e=44b8c466b0)**

And to that end, I have secured a KEY endorsement from a great man and Conservative.

**But more on that later.**

**_I need your support to continue the campaign. We are making tremendous strides in our campaign, but we are being targeted on all sides._**

By Democrats.

By the Fake News Media.

By RINOS who won’t stand up to the Radical Left.

**I need proud patriots like you to join the cause!**

[_Please donate GENEROUSLY today to fight back against election fraud in Arizona and around the country!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=db6cd4d776&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0667fe0d25&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Former NYPD Commissioner Bernard Kerik just endorsed my campaign for Secretary of State, saying:**

**_“I support Mark Finchem for Arizona Secretary of State. He has the integrity, the backbone, and the technical knowledge to ensure our elections are safe and secure from fraud and interference. He knows the job and he will ensure election integrity.”_**

Bernard Kerik is a great man, who with great experience:
* Bernard Kerik earned 30 medals for excellent, meritorious, and heroic service
* He received the New York City Police Department Medal of Valor
* He was honored by Queen Elizabeth II for his heroic work during and in the aftermath of the September 11th attacks.

**I am proud of this endorsement, as he stood by my side and by President Trump in the immediate aftermath of the election fraud in the stolen 2020 election.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e892637d37&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Arizona’s Audit in Maricopa County has been a blessing as the tireless work of countless patriots such as myself, the grassroots movement, and Bernard Kerik have enabled and empowered tremendous success in uncovering systemic election fraud.**

_But Bernard Kerik knows there is a long way to go, and our work is just beginning, which is why he has endorsed me for my run for Secretary of State of Arizona._

**Bernard Kerik knows that I helped start the job, and now I can finish it.** **_“If it wasn’t for Finchem and Borrelli and the hearing they held, this would have been swept under the rug” - Bernard Kerik_**

Friend and Patriots, we are watching history unfold as one of the greatest grassroots movements in history continues to grow – and I am incredibly proud to have Bernard Kerik and Donald Trump on my side.

**Will you join us in our crusade against systemic election fraud to preserve the integrity of our elections?**

[_Join me, Bernard Kerik, Donald Trump, and countless other patriots fighting systemic election fraud by donating today!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=55c11dce0d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=91a2d2ca99&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _[Donate as much as you can to elect me Secretary of State of Arizona!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e44a119498&e=44b8c466b0)_

**My name is Mark Finchem.**

**_I am used to getting attacked on all sides. That’s what happens when you go up against the Fake News Media and the establishment._**

But someone’s got to do it, and I’m the man for the job.

_I will do whatever it takes to make sure that Arizona’s elections are safe, and that AMERICA’S elections are safe._

**Will you stand with me?**

[_Donate TODAY! Let’s stop election fraud together!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=aff9a7e903&e=44b8c466b0)

[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=807c690753&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8c6f49b82a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

| |
---

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=162b0e61ee) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=162b0e61ee).

name: Nancy Mace
subject: I’ve had enough of Dr. Fauci
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced that it obtained 280 pages of documents from the Department of Health and Human Services revealing that from 2014 to 2019, $826,277 was given to the Wuhan Institute of Virology for bat coronavirus research by the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID), which is headed by Dr. Anthony Fauci. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jun 7, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced that it obtained 280 pages of documents from the Department of Health and Human Services revealing that from 2014 to 2019, $826,277 was given to the Wuhan Institute of Virology for bat coronavirus research by the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID), which is headed by Dr. Anthony Fauci. ---|--- | | | | | Months after the Biden administration canceled a program that deported illegal immigrants convicted of sex crimes, the Border Patrol reports a stunning 3,166% increase in sex offenders crossing into the U.S. illegally via Mexico. Known as Operation Talon, the initiative was launched in the final weeks of the Trump administration and was run by Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE). Around a month after Biden took office, Operation Talon was canceled, igniting outrage among law enforcement and elected officials around the country. ---|--- | | | | | In Fitton’s words, the material appears to suggest that “if you see yourself as an ally of minorities, you’re a white supremacist,” and that “Make America Great Again is an example of covert white supremacy.” Among other things, the teaching material also instructs children that “anti-immigration policies are white supremacist,” that the “Celebration of Columbus Day” is racist, and that “claiming that whites are targeted by racism, is racism.” ---|--- | | | | == | == Judicial Watch filed the lawsuit after Catenacci, a white journalist, emailed Mayor Lightfoot’s office requesting a one-on-one interview with the Mayor. The office never replied to the request or to two additional follow-up emails from Catenacci. == ---|--- | | | = The Washington Times Scientists have learned a great deal about the coronavirus, including how it transmits and attacks the body and crucially, how to treat patients and create seemingly effective vaccines. However, scientists are requesting more information that they say is necessary to determine how COVID-19 originated and became a pandemic in order to develop strategies to prevent such a pandemic from ever again visiting such destruction upon humanity. But to this day, Dr. Fauci and NIAID have steadfastly refused to release documents that would help answer this and many other important questions. = CNS News “The normal course of action in a police-related shooting is to quickly inform the public of the details – but the lack of transparency in the killing of veteran Ashli Babbitt in the U.S. Capitol is unprecedented and obviously political,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “That Judicial Watch must file a lawsuit for basic information after five months of stonewalling is a scandal.” The Washington Times John Durham spent roughly $1.5 million of taxpayer funds during his first six months as special counsel probing the origin of the FBI’s investigation into Trump-Russia collusion in the 2016 presidential election, The Washington Times has learned. = = = = = = | CLIPS = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

clean_body: | | | | | The race for Nevada’s governor is heating up. Our Governor Steve Sisolak already has TWO more potential Republican opponents , and they’re not messing around. Former Republican Senator Dean Heller and Rep. Mark Amodei are both vying for the position, but, they’ve already shown they’re not right for Nevada. Here’s the thing, folks. Politico reported that Dean Heller is already meeting with MAJOR Republican party leaders and donors. There’s no doubt he’ll have an incredibly well-funded campaign. And Mark Amodei has had his hat in the ring for a while now — as an incumbent Congressman, he’s sure to rally support from national Republicans, too. This won’t be an easy race, so we need to be ready to fight back. We’re relying on grassroots support from people just like YOU— NOT corporate special interest donors. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for being a Democratic champion, Elect Nevada Democrats | | If you'd like to support Elect Nevada Democrats, you can | Paid for by Home Means Nevada PAC. subject: Expanding liberty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JustinPAC
body:
| | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Dear Friend of Liberty,

It’s been an eventful few months. Since leaving office in January, I’ve led a virtual [seminar series on libertarianism](https://justinpac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aff672dcaa57020dde69caa85&id=c7168cb3f8&e=e3d0258172) at The University of Chicago’s Institute of Politics, appeared on [several](https://justinpac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aff672dcaa57020dde69caa85&id=25556bb0f3&e=e3d0258172) [podcasts](https://justinpac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aff672dcaa57020dde69caa85&id=370d6ba231&e=e3d0258172), and you can frequently find me in liberty-focused rooms on [Clubhouse](https://justinpac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aff672dcaa57020dde69caa85&id=faa2bc1ab2&e=e3d0258172), the new(ish) voice-based social media app.

As your ally in the fight for liberty, I wanted to share with you my most recent media appearance on ABC’s This Week with George Stephanopoulos, where I joined the Powerhouse Roundtable and talked about the duopoly’s assault on representative government and why America needs a successful Libertarian Party.
---
|
---
| You can watch the full segment here: [https://abcnews.go.com/ThisWeek/video/mistake-viewing-trump-lens-justin-amash-78116557](https://justinpac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aff672dcaa57020dde69caa85&id=5a0527d075&e=e3d0258172).

Over the coming weeks and months, I’ll be out at some state Libertarian conventions and will continue my push to strengthen and grow the Libertarian Party, decentralize Congress and government, and defend the rights of all Americans.

See you out there.

In liberty,

Justin

---
